description: Curated restaurant packs built from named food writers, 2025-2026 sources only

cities.description: 86 restaurants from 9 named sources across English, Spanish and Catalan. First v6 pipeline run.
62 restaurants from 5 named sources across English and Spanish
10 restaurants from 3 named sources across English and French
cities.notes: Thin source pool — Arabic-language sources not found via search. Methodology case study.

cities.description: 14 restaurants from 5 named sources across English and French
cities.notes: Arabic-language sources not found via search or direct Jina fetch. First v5 pipeline run.

cities.description: 36 restaurants from 5 independent sources — Strategy C methodology
cities.notes: Strategy C pack — all independent sources, no commercial conflicts. Both-pool zero is structural: independent EN and PT critics cover different restaurant segments. Geocoding pending.

cities.description: 10 restaurants from 3 named sources across English and French
cities.notes: Zero both-pool entries. Thin source pool — single blogger dominated, concentration cap applied. NatGeo secondary + TelQuel primary (1 entry) + Maroclovers primary.

cities.description: 17 restaurants from 5 named sources, all English tourist-facing
cities.notes: All sources tourist-facing — no local food critics in Chefchaouen. Bab Ssour confirmed by 5 sources including FR+EN both-pool. Nominatim v3 achieved 65% geocoding hit rate with zero false positives.

cities.description: 34 restaurants from 5 active sources, all English. Sources: Madame Marie fall + summer 2025, Toronto Life Michelin 2025, The Curious Creature, Canada's 100 Best. v6 fresh run; Toronto Life annual list 403-blocked.
53 restaurants from 10 named sources across English and Portuguese. 2 both-pool entries. 2 Gaia entries flagged neighbourhood_gaia.
cities.notes: Mesa Marcada bylines not extractable via Jina — known limitation. PT source pool thin (Visão + NCultura only). Star Wine List novel source found via Phase 1B.

cities.description: 23 restaurants from 6 named sources across English and Spanish. Zero both-pool is structural — EN and ES sources cover different restaurant segments.
cities.notes: All Phase 0 sources failed (Jina blocked or no content). El Español Málaga holds 100% of ES pool — structural characteristic. Pedregalejo and El Palo included conditionally (2 entries).

cities.description: 31 restaurants from 7 named sources across English and Spanish. 1 both-pool entry (Angelita Madrid). José Carlos Capel included.
cities.notes: v7 clean rebuild. 87% geocoding success. Publisher concentration cap applied (21 entries removed from gastromadrid-blog).

cities.description: 39 restaurants from 5 named sources across English and Spanish. 3 both-pool entries. First v7 pipeline run on a new city.
cities.notes: Structural characteristic: majority of Bilbao food blogs do not credit named authors — 5 sources vs 6-12 target. Concentration cap applied (2 entries from Igor Cubillo removed).
24 restaurants from 6 sources. 23 entries carry open_status_check due to 2023 Infatuation source. No ES-language primary source found — structural characteristic of city media landscape.
